'''âsh-z-b''' ('''kashazab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbefool|unbefool]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbefool|unbefool]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kashazab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazab|thishazab]] || [[word:jishazab|jishazab]] || [[word:shishazab|shishazab]] || [[word:kishazab|kishazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushazab|thuthushazab]] || [[word:jujushazab|jujushazab]] || [[word:shushushazab|shushushazab]] || [[word:kukushazab|kukushazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushazab|thushazab]] || [[word:jushazab|jushazab]] || [[word:shushazab|shushazab]] || [[word:kushazab|kushazab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushazab|thushazab]] || [[word:jushazab|jushazab]] || [[word:shushazab|shushazab]] || [[word:kushazab|kushazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshazab|theshazab]] || [[word:jeshazab|jeshazab]] || [[word:sheshazab|sheshazab]] || [[word:keshazab|keshazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshazab|thothoshazab]] || [[word:jojoshazab|jojoshazab]] || [[word:shoshoshazab|shoshoshazab]] || [[word:kokoshazab|kokoshazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshazab|thoshazab]] || [[word:joshazab|joshazab]] || [[word:shoshazab|shoshazab]] || [[word:koshazab|koshazab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshazab|thoshazab]] || [[word:joshazab|joshazab]] || [[word:shoshazab|shoshazab]] || [[word:koshazab|koshazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshazab|thĂŠshazab]] || [[word:jĂŠshazab|jĂŠshazab]] || [[word:shĂŠshazab|shĂŠshazab]] || [[word:kĂŠshazab|kĂŠshazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashazab|thathashazab]] || [[word:jajashazab|jajashazab]] || [[word:shashashazab|shashashazab]] || [[word:kakashazab|kakashazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashazab|thashazab]] || [[word:jashazab|jashazab]] || [[word:shashazab|shashazab]] || [[word:kashazab|kashazab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashazab|thashazab]] || [[word:jashazab|jashazab]] || [[word:shashazab|shashazab]] || [[word:kashazab|kashazab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashazab|shashazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashazab|goshashazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashazab|gokishashazab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashazabnĂŒ|shashazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashazabnknĂŒ|goshashazabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazabnĂŒ|gokishashazabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashazabshĂ«|shashazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashazabnkshĂ«|goshashazabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashazabshĂ«|gokishashazabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazabro|shashazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazabnkro|goshashazabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazabro|gokishashazabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazabmu|shashazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazabnkmu|goshashazabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazabmu|gokishashazabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashazabsher|shashazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashazabnksher|goshashazabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashazabsher|gokishashazabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashazabng|shashazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashazabnkng|goshashazabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashazabng|gokishashazabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashazabya|shashazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashazabnkya|goshashazabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashazabya|gokishashazabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashazabyam|shashazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashazabnkyam|goshashazabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashazabyam|gokishashazabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazabnĂŒshĂ«|shashazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashazabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashazabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazabnĂŒro|shashazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazabnknĂŒro|goshashazabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazabnĂŒro|gokishashazabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazabnĂŒmu|shashazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazabnknĂŒmu|goshashazabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazabnĂŒmu|gokishashazabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazabshĂ«nĂŒ|shashazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashazabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashazabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazabshĂ«ro|shashazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazabnkshĂ«ro|goshashazabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazabshĂ«ro|gokishashazabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazabshĂ«mu|shashazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazabnkshĂ«mu|goshashazabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazabshĂ«mu|gokishashazabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazabronĂŒ|shashazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazabnkronĂŒ|goshashazabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazabronĂŒ|gokishashazabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazabroshĂ«|shashazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazabnkroshĂ«|goshashazabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazabroshĂ«|gokishashazabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazabromu|shashazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazabnkromu|goshashazabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazabromu|gokishashazabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazabmunĂŒ|shashazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazabnkmunĂŒ|goshashazabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazabmunĂŒ|gokishashazabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazabmushĂ«|shashazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazabnkmushĂ«|goshashazabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazabmushĂ«|gokishashazabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazabmuro|shashazabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazabnkmuro|goshashazabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazabmuro|gokishashazabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
